input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure is constructor/API drift in generated tests around maven-artifact exceptions, not missing setup.

Tests that invoke real Maven build goals may read user settings/local repository or attempt artifact/plugin resolution; prefer offline/local-temp, help/version, diagnostics, or model/configuration paths unless Gradle/native-image verification proves more is needed.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: Resolved org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7 brings its required Maven 2.0.7 modules, Plexus, Wagon providers, commons-cli, classworlds, and metadata resources transitively; meaningful tests can cover MavenCli/version, runtime information, lifecycle mappings, diagnostics, and plugin/configuration helpers without Docker, extra test dependencies, or required environment/system properties.
